login.title: Sign in to CubeSandbox
login.subtitle: Use your admin account to access the Digital Assistant console
login.defaultHint: Default account: admin / admin. For security, change this password in Settings immediately after your first login — the default credentials are public knowledge. See Settings ▸ Change password.

account.title: Account
account.description: Manage the signed-in account and password.

changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.tooShort: New password must be at least 4 characters
